steps.title: Identify the grammatical role
steps.content: The blank is the object of the participle “flapping” — it must name what the butterfly flaps and show that the butterfly possesses it.

steps.title: Apply the possessive rule
steps.content: To show possession, use the possessive pronoun “its,” not the contraction “it's.” Choice A correctly uses “its” with the plural “wings.” The other three choices misuse the contraction or add unnecessary possessive markers. That matches choice A — A is correct.
